review_checklist: Before deploying: grep -n 'add_result' app.py — every call must include video_name
Before deploying: check any batch loop calling generate_concepts uses min(batch_size, remaining) not total count
Run: node qa-flow.js — all 7 user-flow tests must pass against Railway
Run: curl -s https://web-production-d277.up.railway.app/api/disk-usage | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Disk: {d[\"free_mb\"]}MB free')"
MANDATORY if frontend was changed: Open Railway URL in Chrome, run window.__runQA() — ALL tests must pass
MANDATORY if frontend was changed: Actually USE the app via Chrome — switch videos, check hearts, verify field persistence
Would Emerson be able to use this for 10 minutes without hitting an error?
notes: Must handle full iteration cycles without freezing
